title: Webflow Webhook
description: A Webflow Webhook registration object representing an app-created webhook for a site, as returned by the Webflow Data API v2. Webhooks allow applications to receive real-time notifications when specific events occur on a Webflow site.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Webhook registration.

triggerType.description: The type of event that triggers the webhook request.

url.description: URL to send the Webhook payload to.

workspaceId.description: Unique identifier for the Workspace the Webhook is registered in.

siteId.description: Unique identifier for the Site the Webhook is registered in.

filter.description: Only supported for the form_submission trigger type. Filter for the form you want Webhooks to be sent for.

name.description: The name of the form you'd like to receive notifications for.

lastTriggered.description: Date the Webhook instance was last triggered.

createdOn.description: Date the Webhook registration was created.
